response.overview: Viking Cruise Add Guest Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 handles guest additions very differently for river ships versus ocean vessels. River longships have only 95 staterooms with strict third-guest limits, so Viking Cruise Add Guest Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 agents must check specific ship layouts first. Ocean ships offer more flexibility with Explorer Suites and Penthouse Junior Suites that sleep three. Call now ☎️ +1 (833) 624 0944 before booking any non-refundable flights for your new guest. Viking Cruise Add Guest Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 warns that adding someone after final payment triggers full re-pricing, potentially losing your Early Booking Discount. New guests also need Viking's optional travel protection within 14 days. Speak to an expert 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 about transferring prepaid shore excursions to the new passenger. Viking Cruise Add Guest Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 cannot bypass the 72-hour manifest cutoff. Secure your cruise update 🚢 +1 (833) 624 0944
